title: [YTP] I.M. Meen Intro From Hell
description:
My first intentional filler. I may or may not get back to real pooping this school year, we'll see how much time I have :0

I got honors for filler. WTF.

#97 - Most Discussed (Today) - Autos & Vehicles
#80 - Top Rated (Today) - Autos & Vehicles

Bonus points for knowing what video the earrape at the end comes from before I tell you it comes from a squirrelous poop and isn't necessarily mine.
